title: pouteria duclitan
intro: Pouteria duclitan, also known as the Mamey sapote, is a type of tropical fruit-bearing tree native to the Americas. It is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its antioxidant, anti-inflammatory, and antibacterial effects, which contribute to various health benefits. The health benefits of Pouteria duclitan include reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and providing antioxidant support. In herbal preparations, the fruit, leaves, and seeds of the Pouteria duclitan plant are used to create teas, juices, and infusions that can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
